'''âw-k-sh''' ('''wakasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macrodose|macrodose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-k-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macrodose|macrodose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-k-sh
|-
! Lemma
| wakasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wakashithi|wakashithi]] || [[word:wakashiji|wakashiji]] || [[word:wakashishi|wakashishi]] || [[word:wakashi|wakashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wakashuthuth|wakashuthuth]] || [[word:wakashujuj|wakashujuj]] || [[word:wakashushush|wakashushush]] || [[word:wakash|wakash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wakashuthu|wakashuthu]] || [[word:wakashuju|wakashuju]] || [[word:wakashushu|wakashushu]] || [[word:wakashu|wakashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wakashufuth|wakashufuth]] || [[word:wakashufuj|wakashufuj]] || [[word:wakashufush|wakashufush]] || [[word:wakashuf|wakashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wakashethe|wakashethe]] || [[word:wakasheje|wakasheje]] || [[word:wakasheshe|wakasheshe]] || [[word:wakashe|wakashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wakashothoth|wakashothoth]] || [[word:wakashojoj|wakashojoj]] || [[word:wakashoshosh|wakashoshosh]] || [[word:wakash|wakash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wakashotho|wakashotho]] || [[word:wakashojo|wakashojo]] || [[word:wakashosho|wakashosho]] || [[word:wakasho|wakasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wakashofoth|wakashofoth]] || [[word:wakashofoj|wakashofoj]] || [[word:wakashofosh|wakashofosh]] || [[word:wakashof|wakashof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wakashĂŠthĂŠ|wakashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:wakashĂŠjĂŠ|wakashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:wakashĂŠshĂŠ|wakashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:wakashĂŠ|wakashĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wakashathath|wakashathath]] || [[word:wakashajaj|wakashajaj]] || [[word:wakashashash|wakashashash]] || [[word:wakash|wakash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wakashatha|wakashatha]] || [[word:wakashaja|wakashaja]] || [[word:wakashasha|wakashasha]] || [[word:wakasha|wakasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wakashafath|wakashafath]] || [[word:wakashafaj|wakashafaj]] || [[word:wakashafash|wakashafash]] || [[word:wakashaf|wakashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:wakashasha|wakashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowakashasha|gowakashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwakashasha|gokiwakashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wakashnĂŒsha|wakashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowakashnknĂŒsha|gowakashnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwakashnĂŒsha|gokiwakashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wakashĂ«sha|wakashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowakashnkshĂ«sha|gowakashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwakashĂ«sha|gokiwakashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wakashrosha|wakashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowakashnkrosha|gowakashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwakashrosha|gokiwakashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wakashmusha|wakashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowakashnkmusha|gowakashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwakashmusha|gokiwakashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wakasherasha|wakasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowakashnksherasha|gowakashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwakasherasha|gokiwakasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:wakashngasha|wakashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowakashnkngasha|gowakashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwakashngasha|gokiwakashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wakashyasha|wakashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowakashnkyasha|gowakashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwakashyasha|gokiwakashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:wakashyamasha|wakashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowakashnkyamasha|gowakashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwakashyamasha|gokiwakashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wakashnĂŒshĂ«sha|wakashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowakashnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gowakashnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwakashnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiwakashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wakashnĂŒrosha|wakashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowakashnknĂŒrosha|gowakashnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwakashnĂŒrosha|gokiwakashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wakashnĂŒmusha|wakashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowakashnknĂŒmusha|gowakashnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwakashnĂŒmusha|gokiwakashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:wakashĂ«nĂŒsha|wakashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowakashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gowakashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwakashĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiwakashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wakashĂ«rosha|wakashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowakashnkshĂ«rosha|gowakashnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwakashĂ«rosha|gokiwakashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wakashĂ«musha|wakashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowakashnkshĂ«musha|gowakashnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwakashĂ«musha|gokiwakashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:wakashronĂŒsha|wakashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowakashnkronĂŒsha|gowakashnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwakashronĂŒsha|gokiwakashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:wakashroshĂ«sha|wakashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowakashnkroshĂ«sha|gowakashnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwakashroshĂ«sha|gokiwakashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wakashromusha|wakashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowakashnkromusha|gowakashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwakashromusha|gokiwakashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:wakashmunĂŒsha|wakashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowakashnkmunĂŒsha|gowakashnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwakashmunĂŒsha|gokiwakashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:wakashmushĂ«sha|wakashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowakashnkmushĂ«sha|gowakashnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwakashmushĂ«sha|gokiwakashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wakashmurosha|wakashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowakashnkmurosha|gowakashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwakashmurosha|gokiwakashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:wakash|wakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:wĂŠkĂŠsh|wĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howakash|howakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:howĂŠkĂŠsh|howĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowakash|hohowakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowĂŠkĂŠsh|hohowĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒwakash|nĂŒwakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒwĂŠkĂŠsh|nĂŒwĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwakash|nĂŒnĂŒwakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠkĂŠsh|nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻwakash|nĂŻwakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻwĂŠkĂŠsh|nĂŻwĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwakash|nĂŻnĂŻwakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠkĂŠsh|nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwakash|luwakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luwĂŠkĂŠsh|luwĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwakash|luluwakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwĂŠkĂŠsh|luluwĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwakash|liwakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liwĂŠkĂŠsh|liwĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwakash|liliwakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwĂŠkĂŠsh|liliwĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowakash|kowakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kowĂŠkĂŠsh|kowĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowakash|kokowakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowĂŠkĂŠsh|kokowĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewakash|kewakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kewĂŠkĂŠsh|kewĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewakash|kekewakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewĂŠkĂŠsh|kekewĂŠkĂŠsh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
